parameters.design: 5 strategies at 33% budget under masking, chain-length analysis

prediction_outcome: Scenario A confirmed — recent remains universal at n=40. Both hybrids also 100% but no improvement over recent. K-norm drops to 95% on Qwen (first failure ever).
key_finding: Recent confirmed 40/40=100% on Llama [91.2%, 100%]. Pooled 134/134 across Exp 055-059 [97.3%, 100%]. Both hybrid strategies also 100% (60/60) but add no value over pure recent. K-norm drops to 95% on Qwen at n=20 — first failure detected. K-norm = random = 87.5% on Llama under masking. No chain-length effect detected on Qwen (limited range 73-189 tokens).
evidence_impact: Added findings #88-92. 'Recent' universality now at decisive evidence level (pooled 134/134). K-norm 100% on Qwen myth busted. Hybrid strategies shown unnecessary.
next_planned: Test recent on long-chain problems (>200 tokens); test at 20% budget; cross-task validation (non-GSM8K); per-problem concordance analysis

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL at per-head level: 16/16 heads across 2 models.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: DECISIVE: 'Recent' 134/134 pooled [97.3%, 100%] across 5 experiments. Hybrid unnecessary. K-norm=95% Qwen (not 100%). K-norm=random under masking. Chain-length independent (limited range).
